name: Sirin
ability: You start knowing an in-play Townsfolk character. They cannot die.

otherNightReminder: If Sudice guessed correctly today, wake them and nod. :reminder:
name: Sudice
ability: Each day, you may publicly guess the longest chain of good characters. If you are correct, you learn this tonight.

otherNightReminder: Show the character token.
name: Bannik
ability: Each night, learn a character. If you are mad that you are this character, you cannot die  at night. :reminder: If you are mad that you are the Bannik, lose this ability. :reminder:

firstNightReminder: The Moryana points to a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep; if that player is selected later, wake the Moryana and show them the relevant character token.
otherNightReminder: The Moryana points to a player. :reminder: Put them to sleep; if that player is selected later, wake the Moryana and show them the relevant character token.
name: Moryana
ability: Each night, pick a player. Learn which ability selects them first tonight.

firstNightReminder: The Mediciner points to a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Mediciner points to a player. :reminder:
name: Mediciner
ability: Each night, pick a player; they cannot die by execution today if both of their neighbors are good.

firstNightReminder: The Scholar chooses a character type. Show them a character token of that type that is not in play.
otherNightReminder: The Scholar chooses a character type. Show them a character token of that type that is not in play.
name: Scholar
ability: Each night, choose a character type; learn a not-in-play character of that type. [+1 Outsiders]

firstNightReminder: The Chort points at a player. Put the Chort to sleep and wake that player. Show the **THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU** token, then the Chort token.
otherNightReminder: The Chort points at a player. Put the Chort to sleep and wake that player. Show the **THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU** token, then the Chort token.
name: Chort
ability: Each night, pick a player; they learn that you are the Chort. If anyone is mad that you are the Chort, you and they might be executed, even if you are dead.

otherNightReminder: If the Zhrets nominated a living evil player, a different living evil player becomes drunk. :reminder:
name: Zhrets
ability: If you nominate a living evil player, a different living evil player is drunk tonight.

name: Remnant
ability: If you are the last living player on your team, your team wins. The Demon knows who you are, but cannot kill you at night.

otherNightReminder: If the Kikimora died, one of their neighbors dies too. :reminder:
name: Kikimora
ability: Your alive townsfolk neighbors cannot be drunk or poisoned. When you die, one of them dies that night.

name: Skrzak
ability: If you die at night, nobody can die at night tomorrow.

otherNightReminder: If the Acolyte died, show them the **YOU ARE** token and the Acolyte token.
name: Acolyte
ability: You think you are a bluff character, but you are not. When you die, learn that you are the Acolyte.

name: Vila
ability: Each night, one of your good neighbors (different than last night) is drunk, even if you are dead.

otherNightReminder: The Upiór picks a character. :reminder:
name: Upiór
ability: Each night*, pick a unique Townsfolk character. If this character is in play, they are drunk tonight.

otherNightReminder: If the Płanetnik nominated the Demon today, wake the Płanetnik and show them a thumbs down. :reminder:
name: Płanetnik
ability: Each night*, if you nominated the Demon today, you become evil.

otherNightReminder: If the Drekavac became the Demon today, show them the **YOU ARE** token, then the Demon token, then a thumbs down. Wake the old Demon, show them the **YOU ARE** token, then the Drekavac token, then a thumbs up.
name: Drekavac
ability: If the Demon dies by execution and five or more players live, switch characters and alignments with them. If you die by execution, your team loses. [-0 to -1 Outsiders]

otherNightReminder: If the Leshy nominated a good player today, show them that player's character token. :reminder: Wake them again when that character would normally wake.
name: Leshy
ability: You have the ability of the good player you most recently nominated, and they are poisoned. You know what it is.

firstNightReminder: The Blud chooses two players. :reminder: Show them **THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU** and the Blud token.
otherNightReminder: The Blud chooses two players. :reminder: Show them **THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU** and the Blud token.
name: Blud
ability: Each night, pick two living players; they learn this and must vote together, or one or both might die tonight.

firstNightReminder: The Vedmak chooses a player, character, and alignment. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Vedmak chooses a player, character, and alignment. :reminder:
name: Vedmak
ability: Each night, choose a player, character, and alignment. They register as your choice.

otherNightReminder: The Mavka might choose to become a not-in-play Demon. Show the **YOU ARE** token & their new character token, then kill the old Demon. :reminder:
name: Mavka
ability: Once per game, at night*, you may choose to become a not-in-play Demon. If so, the living Demon dies and you don't kill tonight.

otherNightReminder: The Svarog chooses a player. :reminder:
name: Svarog
ability: Each night*, choose a player: their neighbors die.

otherNightReminder: The Arbiter chooses a player.
name: Arbiter
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. :reminder: Townsfolk you nominate die tonight. :reminder: If you nominated a living evil player, you cannot die by execution today. :reminder:

otherNightReminder: The Porevit chooses two players.
name: Porevit
ability: Each night*, choose two players: they die. :reminder: Your bluffs are in-play characters.

otherNightReminder: The Werewolf chooses a player. If an evil player said their phrase, the Werewolf chooses two players.
name: Werewolf
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. :reminder: You start knowing a phrase; if an evil player said it publicly today, kill twice and no deaths may be prevented. :reminder:
